hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf\s+/|git\s+push\s+(-f|--force)\s+(origin\s+)?main|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE|:(){ :|:& };:"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
